sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ الأَصْدِقَاءُ الثَّلَاثَةُ تَنْظِيمَ رِحْلَةِ تَخْيِيمٍ.
sentences.translation: Tri prijatelja su odlučila organizovati kampovanje.
sentences.translationEn: The three friends decided to organize a camping trip.

sentences.arabic: حَمَلُوا خَيَامَهُمْ وَطَعَامَهُمْ وَانْطَلَقُوا إِلَى الْغَابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Uzeli su šatore i hranu i krenuli prema šumi.
sentences.translationEn: They carried their tents and food and headed to the forest.

sentences.arabic: نَصَبُوا الْخَيَامَ قُرْبَ نَهْرٍ صَغِيرٍ جَمِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Postavili su šatore kraj malog lijepog potoka.
sentences.translationEn: They set up the tents near a small beautiful river.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسُوا حَوْلَ النَّارِ لَيْلًا وَغَنَّوْا أَغَانِيَ قَدِيمَةً.
sentences.translation: Sjedili su oko vatre noću i pjevali stare pjesme.
sentences.translationEn: They sat around the fire at night and sang old songs.
